title: Chapter 13
content:
Chapter 13: Chapter 13: You Are Craving It, Though~

She was just putting up a tough front... but deep inside, she was already a total mess.

Pleasuring herself seemed like the only solution she could think of after this whole ordeal, but first, she needed to follow her script, the play is not done yet...

"You are craving it, though~" Owen slid his fingers down, almost touching her private fruit!

Her toes even curled because it was so sudden. She might actually squirt right in front of him if she didn’t control herself!

’Ughnn... I know it’s forbidden and taboo, but why does it feel so good...’ Arielle’s eyes rolled back, losing her sanity as it was hijacked by depraving intensity of love...

The mental wall of being a mother was the only thing keeping her mind from crumbling apart completely; if he weren’t her son, she would literally devour him right now.

She truly cared about their traditional beliefs. The village was considered a holy, sacred place...a place where only an intimate, married man and woman could have sex, or else they would face divine punishment.

She had truly believed that ever since she was a teenager, so soiling such sacred beliefs was not something she could easily bring herself to do.

’Ughnnn... but we are just having a catch-up conversation! Why am I thinking these lewd things?! Maybe this is just the norm in the city!..’ Arielle was trying to justify it to herself.

It couldn’t be called a forbidden act, right? Because they weren’t even doing the actual deed... so why was she overreacting.

Its’s just a mother and son deep relationship.

"Oh... so you want to be teased slowly down here~?" Owen slowly moved his fingers like a soldier.

A good soldier who was ready to take the risk to locate and defuse the bomb.

"Hah... ha... s-stop, Teacher... Owen. I think I need to rest for now... hah... ha..." Her mind went into full throttle.

It was overwhelming for her to take such a risk right now.

She loved her son more than anything else... but she refused to squirt right in front of him.

"Ohoho... it’s just the beginning of the lecture, my student Arielle~" Owen provoked as he was quite surprised that his mom would act this way.

"Hah... ha... I need to use the restroom, Teacher. hah..hann" Arielle was completely crimson now, from her ears to her face... even her neck was tomato red.

’Hehe... I know that you are already extremely sensitive down there mom~’ Owen thought wickedly.

Looking at the helpless display of a busty MILF on top of his lap was truly exhilarating!

Owen wont let the opportunity slip away when it was already within his grasp.

"Hah... s-sorry, Teacher, but I really need to excuse myself!!! Hahnn..." She moved like a flash, her body disappearing from view!

He didn’t expect her to still have the energy to move so fast; he didn’t even manage to grab her wrist before she blitzed right past him before he could even react.

She stood up and viola, she disappeared!

’What...how could she so fast...’ Owen stared at the empty space, in his thighs, while his hands stretch out to the air.

"Ahh... too bad. Maybe it’s too much to push with her affection level being where it’s at. Even my broken skills can’t override that just yet." Owen stood up, feeling disappointed to the twisted turn of events.

Arielle probably wouldn’t be coming out for an hour... so he needed to be a responsible son and clean up the mess from dinner.

Still... he couldn’t help but imagine Arielle fingering herself like a real slut in heat in the restroom!

Even so, he refrained from doing any weird or creepy peeking... so the opening encounter ended just like that.

(Don’t f*p yet, readers. This is just the opening, so it’s to be expected!)

Ding!

[ MILF Special Quest]

[ Teach Arielle more lewd stuff!]

[ Rewards: MILF Token 10x / 250 Exp Points!]

[ Failure: None]

’Heh... even the system gave me a Special Quest. It didn’t expect that I would make such bold moves.’ Owen smirked, satisfied to see that the system wasn’t just a silent bystander... it was actually considerate of his predicament!

Well... speaking of predicaments, at least this Special Quest didn’t have any brutal punishments, saving his balls from the boiling pot again.

"Let’s see my status first. I still don’t know what the purpose of the MILF Tokens is, but I hope they’re useful." Owen had high expectations for a currency specifically meant for MILFs.

Host: Owen Dicke

Age: 23 years old

Level: 3 (23/41)

MILF Token: 5

Skills:

Golden Fingers (SSS Rank)

Smooth Talker (SSS Rank)

MILF Tamer! (SSS+ Rank)

Divine Cock! (SSS+ Rank)

Shop: [ Locked...reach level 10 to unlocked!]

Tamed Milf: None

.....

Owen then selected the question mark indicated above the right corner of the MILF Token display to see its function and use...

Ding!

[MILF Token: You can use this as the Currency of the shop feature.]

"Hmm, that’s short... I didn’t expect it to be so simple and concise. I don’t know what the purpose of the shop is, or what the current goods are in that tab, but I’m not going to expect anything less from the system." Owen couldn’t guess too much about the purpose of the shop feature.

Its main purpose was definitely for buying skills or maybe upgrading the already existing ones, but that was it... he didn’t have any stats, weapons, or items of any kind like in some fantasy adventure novels, so its sole purpose was almost certainly to buy skills.

He didn’t have to worry about that right now because he was only Level 3... and his life wasn’t at risk.

At least he hadn’t transmigrated to a dreadful world.

He shivered as he remembered that " monocle guy" who hunted people down like a crazy ass.

And those worlds with countless monstrosities, that "piece of shit moon guy", or that "mirror-insane obsessed fragment."

Not to mention those cultivation-like worlds.
